docs.title: Welcome
docs.text:
Hi

I am Yash, I am a Data Engineer at Microsoft.

Welcome to my home page!

Check out my Blog

docs.title: Projects
docs.text:
Over time, I have worked on a lot of projects, you can find most of them on my GitHub Profile while some interesting ones are listed below:

  • NiveshPy

    A simple python library for all your investment needs

    Check it out!

  • Healers Diary

    An android app for healers to keep track of their patients and help in instant billing

    Check it out!

  • TimeIt

    A simple and easy to use stopwatch and timer library for android

    Check it out!
